C

com.pallycon.widevinelibrary - package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
 
contentKeyRequest(byte[], Map<String, String>) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconKeyRequest
Implement contentKeyRequest() to request a license and return Content key.
createDrmSessionManager(UUID, String, Uri, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process.
createDrmSessionManagerByCustomData(UUID, String, Uri, String, boolean) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using custom data.
createDrmSessionManagerByProxy(UUID, String, Uri, String, boolean) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using proxy server.
createDrmSessionManagerByToken(UUID, String, Uri, String) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using token.
createDrmSessionManagerByToken(UUID, String, Uri, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using token.

M

MODE_DOWNLOAD - Static variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
Downloads an offline license or renews an existing one.
MODE_PLAYBACK - Static variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
Loads and refreshes (if necessary) a license for playback.
MODE_QUERY - Static variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
Restores an offline license to allow its status to be queried.
MODE_RELEASE - Static variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
Releases an existing offline license.
MpdTrackSelector - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
parses MPEG-DASH manifest file (MPD file) and modifies it.
MpdTrackSelector(Context) - Constructor for class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
constructor of MpdTrackSelector

called when a license is downloaded successfully

called when a license is loaded successfully
onDrmKeysRemoved() - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconEventListener
Called each time offline keys are removed.
onDrmKeysRestored() - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconEventListener
Called each time offline keys are restored.

onNetworkError(NetworkConnectedException) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener
called when there is a network error.

called on other errors during download

called when the download is completed

called on download progressed by 1% when called percentage increase

Called when the internal reference count of this session is decremented.
onReferenceCountIncremented(PallyconDrmSession, int) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener
Called when the internal reference count of this session is incremented.

asynchronous task that is used for downloading content.

PallyconDownloadTask.OnDemandItem - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
 
PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadCallback - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
called by event during file download. downloading files can handled by implementing this callback.
PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
called by event while downloading content
PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadFinishCallback - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
called after the file is downloaded.
PallyconDrmException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
A class for PallyconWVMSDK object's exception which occurs in the following cases:
PallyconDrmException(String) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmException
 
PallyconDrmException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmException
 
PallyconDrmSession - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
 
PallyconDrmSession(UUID, ExoMediaDrm, PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager, PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener, List<DrmInitData.SchemeData>, int, boolean, boolean, byte[], HashMap<String, String>, MediaDrmCallback, Looper, LoadErrorHandlingPolicy, Context, Uri, String, String, Handler, PallyconEventListener) - Constructor for class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSession
Instantiates a new DRM session.
PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Manages provisioning requests.
PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Callback to be notified when the reference count of this session changes.
PallyconDrmSession.UnexpectedDrmSessionException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Thrown when an unexpected exception or error is thrown during provisioning or key requests.
PallyconDrmSessionManager - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
A DrmSessionManager that supports playbacks using ExoMediaDrm.
PallyconDrmSessionManager(UUID, ExoMediaDrm.Provider, MediaDrmCallback, HashMap<String, String>, boolean, @com.google.android.exoplayer2.C.TrackType int[], boolean, LoadErrorHandlingPolicy, long, Context, Uri, String, String, Handler, PallyconEventListener) - Constructor for class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
 
PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Builder for PallyconDrmSessionManager instances.
PallyconDrmSessionManager.MissingSchemeDataException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Signals that the Format.drmInitData passed to PallyconDrmSessionManager.acquireSession(android.os.Looper, com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionEventListener.EventDispatcher, com.google.android.exoplayer2.Format) does not contain scheme data for the required UUID.
PallyconDrmSessionManager.Mode - Annotation Type in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
Determines the action to be done after a session acquired.
PallyconEncrypterException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
A class for client authentication exception occurs when the Site ID or Site Key authentication failed.
PallyconEncrypterException(String) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconEncrypterException
 
PallyconEncrypterException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconEncrypterException
 
PallyconEventListener - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
called by event during DRM process.

A class for offline license exception occurs when acquiring and deleting licenses before playback.

PallyconOfflineLicenseHelperException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconOfflineLicenseHelperException
 
PallyconPermissionException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
A class for Android permission error exception occurs when the application does not have Manifest.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission.
PallyconPermissionException() - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconPermissionException
 
PallyconPermissionException(String) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconPermissionException
 
PallyconPermissionException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconPermissionException
 
PallyconServerResponseException - Exception in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
A class for license server communication error exception

PallyconWVMSDK - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
provides APIs needed to initialize Widevine SDK, confirm initialization, delete license, and acquire PallyconDrmSessionManager.
PallyconWVMSDK.DownloadLicenseResultCallback - Interface in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
called by event during license download.
PallyconWVMSDKFactory - Class in com.pallycon.widevinelibrary
creates PallyconWVMSDK instance which is a singleton
PallyconWVMSDKFactory() - Constructor for class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDKFactory
 
parseMpd(Uri) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
parses MPEG-DASH manifest file, *.mpd.

playClearSamplesWithoutKeys() - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSession
 
PLAYREADY_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY - Static variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
A key for specifying PlayReady custom data in the key request parameters passed to PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder.setPallyConKeyRequestParameters(Map).
prepare() - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
 
provideForceProvisionRequest() - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK

S

schemeDatas - Variable in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSession
The DRM scheme datas, or null if this session uses offline keys.
selectAll(boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
selects or unselects all video and audio track to download.
selectAudioRepresentation(int, int, int, boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
selects or unselects audio Representation to download.
selectBestQuality() - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
selects best quality of video and audio Representation in each AdaptiveSet to download and unselect the others.
selectVideoRepresentation(int, int, int, boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
selects or unselects video Representation to download.
setCid(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
 
setCookie(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.MpdTrackSelector
set cookie.
setCookie(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDownloadTask
 
setCookie(String) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
It can be used in your service by setting a cookie value.
setDrm_type(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
 
setForceSecurityLevelL3(boolean) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
change the security level from Security Level L1 devices to Security Level L3.
setKeyRotation(Boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
 
setLoadErrorHandlingPolicy(LoadErrorHandlingPolicy) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets the LoadErrorHandlingPolicy for key and provisioning requests.
setMode(int, byte[]) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager
Sets the mode, which determines the role of sessions acquired from the instance.
setModifiedMpdPath(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDownloadTask
sets modified mpd file path which contains user-selected video or audio tracks by MpdTrackSelector
if it is not set, all tracks will be download and it maybe consume more storage space
if it is set, only selected track will be download
setPallyConContent(Context, String, String, Uri) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
 
setPallyconEventHandler(Handler) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
 
setPallyconEventListener(PallyconEventListener) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
 
setPallyconEventListener(PallyconEventListener) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
sets the listener for handling events dispatched by WideVineSDK.
setPallyconKeyRequestCallback(PallyconKeyRequest) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
sets the callback for handling Content Key dispatched by WidevineSDK.
setPallyConKeyRequestParameters(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets the key request parameters to pass as the last argument to ExoMediaDrm.getKeyRequest(byte[], List, int, HashMap).
setPallyconKeyRequestProperty(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconHttpMediaDrmCallback
 
setPallyconLoggingListener(PallyconLoggingListener) - Method in interface com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconWVMSDK
sets the listener for handling logging dispatched by WideVineSDK.
setPallyConMultiSession(boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets whether this session manager is allowed to acquire multiple simultaneous sessions.
setPallyConUuidAndExoMediaDrmProvider(UUID, ExoMediaDrm.Provider) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets the UUID of the DRM scheme and the ExoMediaDrm.Provider to use.
setPlayClearSamplesWithoutKeys(boolean) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets whether clear samples within protected content should be played when keys for the encrypted part of the content have yet to be loaded.
setPolicy(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
 
setSessionKeepaliveMs(long) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets the time to keep DrmSessions alive when they're not in use.
setSite_id(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
 
setUseDrmSessionsForClearContent(@com.google.android.exoplayer2.C.TrackType int...) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
Sets whether this session manager should attach DrmSessions to the clear sections of the media content.
setUserId(String) - Method in class com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconTokenInfo
